visual_description: A young boy with light-colored hair, wearing a gray shirt, is seated and focused on an object in his hands. An adult’s hands are visible nearby, assisting or interacting with the boy’s activity. The scene is dimly lit, with the boy’s gaze directed downward at the object he is handling.
